---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the workflow or situation that is not currently supported. For example: "When I have array jobs, I cannot see individual sub-task states in the monitor."

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you would like the tool to do. Be as specific as you can — UI behaviour, what data would be shown, how it would be triggered.

## Alternatives Considered

Any workarounds you have tried or other approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, links to SLURM documentation, or any other context that would help evaluate the request.
